name: Starseed Pilgrim
short_description: Starseed Pilgrim is a game about tending a symphonic garden, exploring space, and embracing fate.You are a gardener, tending to empty noise and empty space to fill them both with colour.You are a refugee, building your own world away from the spreading darkness.You are an explorer, discovering new places, new rules, and new fascinations.
detailed_description:
Starseed Pilgrim is a game about tending a symphonic garden, exploring space, and embracing fate.


You are a gardener, tending to empty noise and empty space to fill them both with colour.

You are a refugee, building your own world away from the spreading darkness.

You are an explorer, discovering new places, new rules, and new fascinations.


The Universe Is Bigger Than You Know.
